roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC17(B) PETITION REDUCE TO MISDEMEANOR FILED
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DFT'S ATTY MOT TO CONTINUE PRELIM FILED

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 17(B) MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X: THE COURT GRANTS MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) AS TO COUNT 8, PC487(A),/CTORD: CHARGE (S) REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR/X: ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/PROB MOD:FORMAL SUPERVISED PROBATION IS CONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION/X:ALL OTHER TERMS OF PROBATION REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED/

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:DEFENSE REQUEST TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE PRESENTENCE REPORT IS GRANTED BY THE COURT AS TO CIRCUMSTANCES OF AGGRAVATION #3, #4 AND#6,/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 231D/CTS:231/IND/WS/WEAP/SA1:NORALYNALVIAR-NOVICK/SA2:748 VIENNA ST,, S,F, CA/RESTV/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:PROHIBITED PERSONS RELINQUISHMENT FORMS FINDINGS IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/X:PURSUANT TO NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, UPON 18 MONTHS OF SUCCESSFUL PROBATION DEFENDANT MAY PETITION THE COURT FOR PC 17(B) MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION WITHOUT OBJECTION BY THEDISTRICT ATTORNEY,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 8, PC 487(A), A FELONY,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:8/IBARRA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COUNT8,/OR/SA1:NORALYN ALVIAR-NOVICK/SA2:748 VIENNA ST,, S,F, CA/SAORD/PRES:04-12-18/PPRF/CONTD:PSR AND SENTENCE/DOP/ARBUCKLE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONTINUED BY STIPULATIONOF PARTIES,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:THE COURT SPEAKS WITH WITNESS NORALYN ALVIAR NOVICK IN CONFIDENCE AND APPOINTS ATTORNEY RICHARD SHIKMANAS WITNESS COUNSEL,/ /X: THE FOLLOWING SFPD OFFICERS ARE ORDERED TO RETURNTO COURT FOR HEARING ON 03-14-18:   DUSTIN COLCLOUGH #2411;  ALEXIS DEDET#101;  JASON TRUMPP #1102;  JOSEPH MENDIOLA #1975;  ROEL DILAG #173;  CHRISTOPHER HARDY #4370;  MATTHEW INOCENCIO #895,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:CO-DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CONTD:ERP ON 02-22-18 IN D23 AT 2:00 P,M/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARINGON 03-08-18 AT 9:00 A,M/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED BY STIPULATION OF PARTIES,/CONTD:ERP ON 01-17-18 IN D23/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HRG ON 01-22-18 IN D20/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED WITHOUT OBJECTION,/STWPX/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 09-22-17/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 11-13-17/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:PD DECLARED A CONFLICT/CON:MALCOLM SMITH/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:09-29-17/987,2/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR NOMINAL BAIL/BAIL:100000/CTORD:BAIL IS SUBJECT TO ACM CONDITIONS/SAORD/SA1:150 YARDS NORALYN ALVIAR NOVICK; NORMAN ALVES; SITUA BROWN; LESTER HIDALGO/SA2:722 VIENNA ST, SF, CA/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: PTC/X: COURT CONFIRMS FUTURE HEARING DATE,/
/CAL: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CTORD: MATTER TO BE CONTINUED DUE TO COURT UNAVAILABILITY/X: CONFIRM ALL FUTURE COURT DATES/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL: PTC/DAWT/X: COURT CONFIRMS FUTURE HEARING DATE,/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 09-22-17 IS CONFIRMED,/CONTD:CO-DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE/DOP/
